mapper.sql: id, question_md5, original_question, cached_answer, knowledge_ids, visit_count, first_visit_time, last_visit_time, create_time, expire_time, status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM hot_question WHERE question_md5 = #{questionMd5} AND status = 0 AND expire_time > NOW()
SELECT FROM hot_question WHERE expire_time <= #{currentTime} AND status = 0
SELECT FROM hot_question WHERE visit_count >= #{threshold} AND status = 0 ORDER BY visit_count DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hot_question WHERE status = 0
SELECT FROM hot_question WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY last_visit_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
